title: Business Intelligence Analysts
description: Produce financial and market intelligence by querying data repositories and generating periodic reports. Devise methods for identifying data patterns and trends in available information sources.

tasks.text: Generate standard or custom reports summarizing business, financial, or economic data for review by executives, managers, clients, and other stakeholders.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain or update business intelligence tools, databases, dashboards, systems, or methods.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Manage timely flow of business intelligence information to users.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide technical support for existing reports, dashboards, or other tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Identify and analyze industry or geographic trends with business strategy implications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Document specifications for business intelligence or information technology reports, dashboards, or other outputs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Create business intelligence tools or systems, including design of related databases, spreadsheets, or outputs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collect business intelligence data from available industry reports, public information, field reports, or purchased sources.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Disseminate information regarding tools, reports, or metadata enhancements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct or coordinate tests to ensure that intelligence is consistent with defined needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Synthesize current business intelligence or trend data to support recommendations for action.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze competitive market strategies through analysis of related product, market, or share trends.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Identify or monitor current and potential customers, using business intelligence tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Communicate with customers, competitors, suppliers, professional organizations, or others to stay abreast of industry or business trends.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain library of model documents, templates, or other reusable knowledge assets.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Create or review technical design documentation to ensure the accurate development of reporting solutions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze technology trends to identify markets for future product development or to improve sales of existing products.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
